en_title: No Rest for the Wicked Developer Blames Series S for Xbox Release Delay
cn_title: 《No Rest for the Wicked》开发者指责Xbox Series S导致延期
subtitle: 又是Series S的锅
opus_summary: 《No Rest for the Wicked》开发商Moon Studio创始人Thomas Mahler称Xbox Series S性能限制导致Xbox版延期，PS5版10月发售。此前《黑神话：悟空》和《博德之门3》也因类似问题延迟。

paragraphs.en: The Xbox Series S is taking some heat once again following comments made by the founder of Moon Studio, the team behind action RPG No Rest for the Wicked , which has been available on Steam Early Access since 2024.
paragraphs.cn: Xbox Series S再次成为众矢之的，起因是动作RPG《恶意不息》开发商Moon Studio创始人的一番言论。该作自2024年起已在Steam抢先体验平台上线。

paragraphs.en: During the PlayStation State of Play, it was confirmed the game was coming to PS5 this October in celebration of its 1.0 release, but Xbox users will have to wait. This isn't due to any kind of marketing deal with PlayStation. Rather, it has to do with limitations with the Xbox Series S. In response to a fan inquring about the lack of an Xbox release date, studio founder and game director Thomas Mahler pointed to the Series S.
paragraphs.cn: 在PlayStation State of Play发布会上，官方确认该作将于今年10月登陆PS5，以庆祝1.0正式版的发布，但Xbox玩家则需继续等待。这并非因为与PlayStation达成了任何营销协议，而是由于Xbox Series S的性能限制。当有粉丝询问为何没有Xbox发售日期时，工作室创始人兼游戏总监Thomas Mahler将矛头指向了Series S。

paragraphs.en: "Series S is making that rough," said Mahler in a comment on Discord. "We'll ship it after in a good way once it's optimized like crazy for Switch 2 and Xbox."
paragraphs.cn: 「Series S让这件事变得棘手，」Mahler在Discord上评论道，「我们会先全力为Switch 2和Xbox进行优化，之后再以良好的状态推出。」

paragraphs.en: Another user joked that a mobile version would follow the Xbox and Switch 2 versions, to which Mahler responded: "Series S and mobile specs aren't too far apart at this point."
paragraphs.cn: 另一位用户开玩笑说，在Xbox和Switch 2版本之后还会推出手机版，Mahler回应道：「Series S和手机配置目前差距已经不大了。」

paragraphs.en: This is hardly the first time something like this has happened. The Xbox version of Black Myth: Wukong was delayed by a year and it was heavily rumored that it may be due to difficulties developing for the consoles. Microsoft responded to these rumors noting that it had not been informed of such troubles, but developer Game Science later suggested those rumors may have had some truth to them. Game Science CEO Yongar Feng-Ji noted in January 2025 that the Xbox Series S' 10 GBs of shared memory was creating issues with optimization . When the game was eventually released on Xbox , the studio confirmed that the delay was a result of spending extra time trying to optimize the game specificially for Xbox.
paragraphs.cn: 这已经不是第一次出现类似情况了。《黑神话：悟空》的Xbox版本延期了一年，当时有大量传闻称原因在于主机开发困难。微软回应称并未收到此类问题的报告，但开发商游戏科学后来暗示这些传闻可能并非空穴来风。游戏科学CEO冯骥在2025年1月指出，Xbox Series S的10GB共享内存给优化带来了问题。当游戏最终登陆Xbox时，工作室确认延期是因为花费了额外时间专门针对Xbox进行优化。

paragraphs.en: Baldur's Gate 3 also suffered issues when it came to developing for the Xbox Series S . The game had a staggered release across platforms, arriving in August 2023 for PC, September for PS5, and December for Xbox. That wasn't by choice, necessarily. Larian had troubles getting split-screen co-op to work smoothly on Xbox Series S. The studio even enlisted the help of Microsoft's own engineers to help get it all functioning.
paragraphs.cn: 《博德之门3》在针对Xbox Series S开发时也遇到了问题。该作在不同平台分阶段发售：2023年8月登陆PC，9月登陆PS5，12月才登陆Xbox。这并非出于自愿。Larian在让分屏合作模式在Xbox Series S上流畅运行方面遇到了困难，工作室甚至请来了微软自家的工程师协助解决。

paragraphs.en: With all of this said, there has been a lot of discussion throughout the current console generation over whether or not the Xbox Series S is worth the hassles. Microsoft mandates that all Xbox Series X titles must also work on Series S with full feature parity, but it has led to some games being released later on the platform. It begs the question whether Project Helix, the next Xbox console , will have a cheaper and weaker variant – or if Microsoft will go all-in on one SKU. Given how aggressive Xbox's new CEO Asha Sharma has been, it's hard to imagine the company doing two consoles again, but we'll just have to wait and see.
paragraphs.cn: 综上所述，在本世代主机周期中，关于Xbox Series S是否值得带来这些麻烦的讨论一直不绝于耳。微软要求所有Xbox Series X游戏必须同步支持Series S并保持功能完全一致，但这导致部分游戏在该平台上延期发售。这不禁让人思考：下一代Xbox主机Project Helix是否会推出一个更便宜、性能更弱的版本？还是微软会全力押注单一SKU？考虑到Xbox新任CEOAsha Sharma一贯激进的作风，很难想象公司会再次推出两款主机，但我们也只能拭目以待。

paragraphs.en: For now, No Rest for the Wicked will release on PS5 on an unspecified date in October. The Xbox release date is currently to be confirmed.
paragraphs.cn: 目前，《恶意不息》将于今年10月登陆PS5，具体日期未定。Xbox版发售日期则待定。

paragraphs.en: Cade Onder is a freelancer for IGN's news team. He covers all things entertainment, including gaming, film, and more. You can find him on Twitter @Cade_Onder.
paragraphs.cn: Cade Onder是IGN新闻团队的自由撰稿人，报道游戏、电影等所有娱乐内容。你可以在X上关注他 @Cade_Onder。

manual_approved_issues.detail: opus_summary must be 70-80 non-space characters, got 111
